distributeSalary().notice: Distribute salary to eligible council members. Can be called by anyone after the interval passes.

voteToRemove(address).notice: Council members can vote to remove a bad actor (stop their pay). Requires > 50% of council to agree. H-3 Fix: Votes are now term-scoped to prevent cross-term accumulation

documentation.text:
Distribute salary to eligible council members.
 Can be called by anyone after the interval passes.

Council members can vote to remove a bad actor (stop their pay).
 Requires > 50% of council to agree.
 H-3 Fix: Votes are now term-scoped to prevent cross-term accumulation
